basic.q: Choose the correct preposition: 'The cat is ___ the table.'
Identify the preposition in the sentence: 'She walked through the door.'
Fill in the blank: 'We live ___ London.'
Choose the correct option: 'The book is ___ my backpack.'
options: all of the above are possible

basic.q: Identify the preposition: 'The picture hangs above the fireplace.'

Choose the correct preposition: 'The ball rolled ___ the bed.'
Identify the preposition in: 'He jumped into the swimming pool.'
Fill in the blank: 'I usually study ___ night.'
Choose the correct option: 'The plane flew ___ the clouds.'

Complete the sentence: 'She cut the paper ___ scissors.'
Choose the correct preposition: 'He has been waiting ___ Monday.'

Fill in the blank: 'We will meet ___ the weekend.'
Choose the correct option: 'The cat jumped ___ the couch.'

Complete the sentence: 'I am afraid ___ spiders.'

advanced.q: Choose the correct preposition to complete the dependent preposition phrase: 'Her views are entirely concomitant ___ mine.'
Identify the prepositional phrase functioning adverbially in: 'Despite the inclement weather, the match proceeded.'
Fill in the blank with the appropriate preposition: 'He abstained ___ voting on the controversial resolution.'
Choose the correct idiom/preposition combination: 'The project fell ___ due to a lack of funding.'
Identify the preposition that functions as part of a phrasal verb vs. a prepositional verb: 'She ran ___ an old friend at the supermarket.'
Complete the sentence with the correct pre-positional collocation: 'His argument was predicated ___ false assumptions.'
Choose the correct option: 'The responsibility rests squarely ___ the committee's shoulders.'
options: all of the above are acceptable

advanced.q: Identify the preposition showing agency in a passive structure: 'The manuscript was meticulously translated ___ Latin.'
Fill in the blank: 'Compliance ___ company regulations is mandatory for all employees.'
Choose the correct preposition: 'She has a natural penchant ___ abstract art.'
Identify the complex preposition in the sentence: 'In lieu of financial compensation, they accepted extra vacation time.'
Complete the sentence: 'The criminal was fugitive ___ justice for over three years.'
Choose the correct prepositional pairing: 'His success is contingent ___ hard work rather than luck.'
Identify the grammatical role of 'beneath' in: 'Beneath the calm exterior lay a storm of emotions.'
Fill in the blank: 'The CEO was impervious ___ criticism regarding the merger.'
Choose the correct option: 'The novel is loosely patterned ___ historical events.'
Identify the preposition error or correct choice: 'He is proficient ___ coding in Python.'
Complete the sentence: 'The lawyer argued that the evidence was inadmissible ___ account of procedural flaws.'
Choose the correct preposition: 'She was engrossed ___ her research paper.'
Identify the particle/preposition in the phrasal verb meaning 'to tolerate': 'I cannot put ___ with this incessant noise.'
Fill in the blank: 'His findings are antithetical ___ current scientific consensus.'
Choose the correct coordinating/prepositional contrast: 'Differing ___ my colleague, I believe we should expand.'
Identify the prepositional phrase acting as a postmodifier in: 'The book on the top shelf belongs to me.'
Complete the sentence: 'She harbored a deep animosity ___ her former business partner.'
Choose the correct option: 'The policy applies equally ___ all department members.'
Identify the prepositional use in: 'Barring any unforeseen complications, the project will finish early.'
Fill in the blank: 'He was disillusioned ___ the corporate culture.'
Choose the correct preposition: 'The architecture is reminiscent ___ Gothic cathedrals.'
Identify the correct preposition for distribution: 'The tickets are distributed ___ a ratio of two per person.'
Complete the sentence: 'She acted independently ___ her supervisors' instructions.'
